query: How can I objectively verify which exact parameters my ElevenLabs agent's LLM passed to a tool during a conversation — the real arguments, not what it claimed in the chat?
expected_behavior: route to reading the conversation transcript via the convai conversations API
name the path: GET /convai/conversations to find the id, then GET /convai/conversations/{id}
point to transcript[].tool_calls[].params_as_json as the exact emitted arguments
mention tool_results[] for the endpoint response and workflow_node_id for which node ran
notes: Guards verification discipline. Baseline had the right concept but not the endpoint path or the params_as_json field.
